name: String of weapon name
description: String of short description of weapon
baseDmg: String of base weapon damage, e.g 2d6
cost: Positive INT of req cost of weapon
slots: Positive INT of how many inventory slots the weapon takes up
special: String of additional special properties or restrictions of weapon
tags: Array of keyword tag IDs for the weapon
isMinor: Boolean of whether weapon has Minor keyword and takes up no slots
isEquipped: Boolean if weapon is currently equipped
armor: Positive INT of + armor value of weapon (mostly for shields)
